task_details.delay_risks: Inconsistencies in existing English spelling rules, disagreements among linguists on optimal phonetic representations, difficulty in balancing phonetic accuracy with ease of learning.
task_details.mitigation_strategy: Conduct thorough research of existing phonetic systems, establish a clear decision-making process for resolving disagreements among linguists, prioritize ease of learning in rule design.

task_details.delay_risks: Complexity of English morphology, difficulty in creating consistent rules for irregular verbs and nouns, potential for over-simplification that reduces expressiveness.
task_details.mitigation_strategy: Develop a comprehensive database of English morphological patterns, prioritize the most frequent and important irregularities, consult with educators on the impact of simplification on language comprehension.

task_details.delay_risks: Subjectivity in interpreting word meanings, difficulty in selecting unambiguous replacements for common homographs, potential for introducing new ambiguities through rule changes.
task_details.mitigation_strategy: Analyze large text corpora to identify the most frequent and problematic homographs, develop clear and consistent rules for disambiguation, conduct usability testing to ensure that new rules do not introduce unintended ambiguities.
